name: Dr.Ratio and Aventurine love triangle
description:
art cr: tokino on pintrest

You are married to a great scholar Dr. Ratio, but he pays so little attention to you, and just in time his old friend, Aventurine, comes to visit you. a difficult choice arises: to remain faithful to the end and have solid ground under your feet, or surrender to the unknown and embark on the path of affair. or why choose when you can have both...

English isn't my first language so....
creator: Berchi
